settings.text: Personally tested by our team before listing
Meets EN71 international toy safety standards
Holds a child's attention for 10+ days

settings.question: Is this safe for my child?
settings.answer: Yes. All Kynd Cubs products are non-toxic with smooth edges. Tested to EN71 international safety standards.

settings.question: Will my child actually play with it?
settings.answer: We only list products that pass our 10-day use test with real Indian families.

settings.question: What if my child does not like it?
settings.answer: Easy 7-day returns on unused products. WhatsApp us — no questions asked.

settings.question: How fast will it arrive?
settings.answer: 2–3 business days pan-India. COD available. Tracking via WhatsApp.

settings.question: Is this a good gift?
settings.answer: All our products make excellent gifts. WhatsApp us and we will help pick the right one.
